scripts.build:client: cd client && gleam build && cd .. && npx esbuild ./client/build/dev/javascript/client/app/app.mjs --bundle --outfile=./server/priv/static/app.mjs --format=esm --footer:js="main();"
scripts.dev: npm run build:client && npm run server
scripts.start: npm run build:client && (npm run tts & npm run server)
